review_history.summary: The blocked-NotebookLM scenario still tests independent-lane preparation, honest blocker/skip packets, atomic comparison, dedupe, and downstream authority limits.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: bounded goal and frozen-brief obligations precede all lanes
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: lane and comparison isolation requirements are explicit
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass: CLI blocker, no browser fallback, independent Codex packet, and external skip are distinguishable
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass: atomic buckets, trace-preserving dedupe, and agreement-not-truth are required
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: Knowledge Wiki Cell handoff is separated from registration and workflow/canon/default-route authority
hard_gate_coverage.HG6: pass: external action, auth, payload, secret, golden, and fabricated execution risks are gated

no_golden_finding: pass: no reference answer, candidate body, or lane-output oracle is present.
residual_gaps: This dry-run cannot establish CLI, browser, subagent, source-research, or downstream handoff runtime quality.
